name: John Miller

current_profile.summary: Junior backend developer (2 years) building enterprise services in Java. CS degree; comfortable with APIs, databases, and unit tests. Has done small ML side projects (Kaggle) and basic Python, but no production ML experience.
current_profile.ai_experience: Small ML side projects on Kaggle, basic Python ML

learning_intent: Wants to specialize in ML engineering: build, deploy, and monitor models in production. Motivated by demand and interest in AI systems.

target_jd.title: Machine Learning Engineer
requirements: Develop ML models and integrate them into products and services
Build data pipelines, training/inference workflows, and monitoring systems
Perform model evaluation, experimentation, and iterative improvements
Collaborate across engineering, product, and data science teams

expected_skill_gaps.description: Strengthen Python, data handling, and cloud primitives; secrets management and CI/CD concepts.
Tracing/observability, unit tests for prompts/models, and quality dashboards.
Latency/cost drivers, caching/streaming concepts, versioning prompts/models.
RAG basics, tool calling, and orchestration patterns.
